data.biography:
Apasiri Nitibhon, nicknamed Um, is a Thai supermodel and actress. She is the younger sister of Amarin Nitibhon, a Thai singer and actor. She entered the entertainment industry by becoming a model at the age of 18 after the 'Trend Setter' contest. Likewise, Apasiri then took photoshoots for magazines and became well known in the modeling industry in the 1990s with a unique face and 173 centimeters tall.

She began her acting career at the age of 25 by taking part in the film 'Sunset at Chaopraya' in 1995, starring as 'Angsumalin'.  Apasiri trained as a likay dancer in her youth. For the 2006 film, 'The Victim', she portrayed a beauty queen who performs a likay dance. For this role, she had to receive a refresher course in Thai classical dance.
data.name: Apasiri Nitibhon

data.biography:
阿帕斯莉·妮缇布恩（Um），1970年9月14日出生于泰国，泰国女演员、模特。

代表作品：《吓死鬼》、《日落湄南河》、《荷尔蒙》、《不期而爱》、《吹落的树叶》、《兄弟情浓于血》等。
data.name: 阿帕斯莉·妮缇布恩
อาภาศิริ นิติพน

data.biography:
阿帕斯莉·妮緹布恩（Um），1970 年 9 月 14 日出生於泰國，泰國女演員、模特。

代表作品：《嚇死鬼》、《日落湄南河》、《荷爾蒙》、《不期而愛》、《吹落的樹葉》、《兄弟情濃於血》等。
data.name: 阿帕斯莉·妮緹布恩
